text: Key strategic initiatives include expansion of small business support programs and travel partnership development. On November 12, 2025, American Express announced a new $5 million Shop Small Grants Program and content partnership with creator Keith Lee, building on its Small Business Saturday initiative created in 2010. The company presented at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025 on November 12, 2025, indicating ongoing engagement with the fintech and payments ecosystem. These initiatives suggest management is focused on strengthening merchant relationships and expanding network value propositions beyond traditional card services.
